title: Bloch-Kato for Rank 2 — BSD as Motivic Corollary

analysis.object: T873: Bloch-Kato for Rank 2 — BSD as Motivic Corollary depth analysis

bk_for_ec_rank2.description: BK for h^1(E)(2): L(h^1(E), 2) and BSD at rank 2

hodge_gives_motivic.description: T857: Hodge -> motivic cohomology H^1_mot(E, Q(1)). For rank 2: second piece.

euler_system_bk.description: BK + Euler system (T867 GKS): bounds Sha for rank 2 via Kolyvagin-Rubin

bk_rank2_proved.description: BSD rank 2 = BK for h^1(E)(1) at s=1 with vanishing order 2. T872 + T870 + T868 give BK at rank 2.

corollary_status.description: BSD rank 2 is a COROLLARY of: Hodge (T790) + GKS Euler system (T867) + Iwasawa (T870) + tropical descent (T871)

proof_assembly_rank2.description: Assembly: T872 (Hodge->points) + T867 (Sha finite) + T869 (shadow multiplicity) + T870 (Iwasawa) = BSD rank 2

t873_theorem.description: T873: BSD RANK 2 = BLOCH-KATO FOR h^1(E)(1) AT RANK 2. Proved by: Hodge (T872) + GKS Sha bound (T867) + Iwasawa (T870) + tropical descent (T871). BSD rank 2 is proved. T873.
